For four long years, I carried the crushing weight of this case on my shoulders. It affected every part of my life — emotionally, mentally, and personally. While the opposition attempted every tactic possible to mislead and deceive the jury, they were ultimately unsuccessful. The preparation, intelligence, and relentless advocacy of this team made the difference.

Their professionalism, clarity, and strength restored my faith in the justice system. They did not just defend me — they fought for me. They believed in me. And because of them, I finally have my life back.

What once felt like a never-ending dark chapter has now closed. I can finally breathe again, move forward, and begin looking toward the future with hope, peace, and freedom.

If you are looking for attorneys who combine courage, integrity, strategic brilliance, and an unwavering commitment to their clients, this is the team you want in your corner. I will forever be grateful for their representation and would trust them again without hesitation.

reviews.text:
I retained Key Law Firm expecting competent representation and proactive legal advocacy. Instead, I encountered persistent breakdowns in communication, lack of follow-through, and minimal initiative from my attorney. On several occasions, I was forced to draft my own legal correspondence after being ignored—only for it to be sent without further action or clarification.

Most concerningly, I was not adequately informed of the legal consequences of signing a key document, despite raising specific concerns. I was left to discover the impact after the fact—something I never would have agreed to had I been properly advised. When I expressed confusion or urgency, I was met with dismissiveness or delayed responses, rather than solutions.

While the firm may argue their legal advice was intended to avoid escalation, they offered no practical alternatives or protective measures when I expressed discomfort or risk. Another attorney in the firm candidly admitted that some key steps were overlooked and that my concerns were valid—confirming what I had suspected all along.

In the end, I felt unprotected, under-informed, and responsible for managing the very case I was paying someone else to handle. I would caution others to seek representation elsewhere, especially if your situation demands clarity, assertiveness, and consistent legal support.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We take concerns of this nature very seriously, and we are sorry to hear that you felt your experience with our office did not meet your expectations. At Key Law Office, we emphasize communication, thorough preparation, and client-centered advocacy. It is deeply concerning to us that you left feeling under-informed or unsupported.

Family law is, by its very nature, a difficult process where tensions often run high. We understand that the stakes are deeply personal and that frustrations with the process—or with the other side—can sometimes be directed toward counsel. Our attorneys are dedicated to providing good, objective advice, even when that advice may be difficult to receive, because our goal is always to help clients make informed decisions and to pursue the right course of action.

We also want to be clear: never in the history of our practice have we permitted or required a client to draft any legal document. All filings, correspondence, and legal drafting are completed by our attorneys and legal staff. Additionally, we have firm policies in place regarding prompt follow-up to client communications, and those policies are diligently enforced across our office.

While confidentiality prevents us from addressing the specifics of your case in a public forum, we do want to reassure both you and future clients that our attorneys take seriously the responsibility of ensuring clients understand the legal implications of any documents they sign and the strategic options available to them. We continuously review our processes to uphold the highest standards of professionalism.

We welcome the opportunity to discuss your concerns directly, in a confidential manner, to better understand your experience and to address them constructively. Our commitment remains the same: to provide clear communication, diligent advocacy, and objective legal advice, even in the most challenging circumstances.

After reading such great reviews from the Key Law Office I decided to book a consultation for my husband who is currently battling for full custody of his 3 kids. My husbands case then was transferred to Jacob Dannen who over a 20 min phone  call told my husband "Hey man i'm tryna help you out here." as if my family was asking for a favor vs paying him for his time. This was the first and last time my husband ever was able to get in contact with this lawyer. We were billed because Alicia called my phone instead of my husbands after we corrected the contact number with Miguel. We got billed for BOTH LAWYERS to "prep" to take on his case even after we were promised we would get credited for Miguel's meeting and prep work since he didn't represent us and we still stuck with the firm. Overall, my husband feels that we spent unnecessary money as has since gone Pro-Se and we ended our relationship with them over 2 missed meetings, 3 unreturned phone calls, and the lack of professionalism and readiness from Jacob. I urge all families to go elsewhere for legal representation as this experience has just delayed our journey to keep the kids safe.

UPDATE: we have received several emails and phone calls about my review.
